texto: Back on the Hauser regime, I start the day with his notorious "pep breakfast" -- two raw eggs beaten in orange juice. Hauser describes it as a "creamy drink fit for a King's table." I do not feel the same way. This is so much worse than the raw eggs in milk that I drank for the Marilyn Monroe diet.If pneumonia were a food, this is what it would taste like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rebecca Harrington: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Back on the Hauser regime, I start the day with his notorious "pep breakfast" -- two raw eggs bea…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, food, hauser pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
